base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of npcs_and_magic_wands — a character (boss) from 1988 super mario bros 3. NPCs — Toad (mushroom-house keeper), Princess (ending), King of each world (bear/cat/duck/elephant/etc. transformed by Koopalings), magic-wand projectile sprite fired by Koopalings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: NPCs — Toad (mushroom-house keeper), Princess (ending), King of each world (bear/cat/duck/elephant/etc. transformed by Koopalings), magic-wand projectile sprite fired by Koopalings
